name: Apple n' Spice Muffins
recipeInstructions:
1. In a medium bowl, combine apple sauce, eggs, oil, nuts, and raisins.
2. Stir in the Carnation Basic Muffin Mix until just moistened.
3. Spoon batter equally into 12 greased or paper-lined muffin cups.
4. Bake in a 350°F oven for 20-25 minutes, or until muffins spring back when lightly touched.
5. Cool slightly; remove from muffin cups.
